---
name: Help wanted
description: A scoped task where contributors can help
title: "Help wanted: "
labels: ["help wanted"]
assignees: []
---

## What needs help?

Describe the task clearly.

## Why it matters

Explain what this unlocks for a0, AIMMH, contributors, or users.

## Suggested scope

- [ ] Small first step:
- [ ] Expected files/areas:
- [ ] Out of scope:

## Useful context

Link relevant files, docs, issues, or prior discussion.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Documentation updated if needed.
- [ ] Tests or manual verification described.
- [ ] No secrets or private data included.
